Title: Data Engineer
HTML:
We’re looking for the special, unique and amazing YOU!


@ KCS IT, we look for the ones that stands out, for those that always wants to be better and fight for it, and for those who has the same values that we do: dedication, energy, integrity, transparency, flexibility, trust, honesty, hard work, proactivity, team work.

At KCS we stand for equality and value diversity. We create a safe, diverse environment where opportunities are equal for everyone! We do not discriminate based on age, ethnicity, sexual orientation, gender, disability or any factor other than merit. All applications with skills for the position are welcome!


We are looking for an Amazing: Data Engineer

Seniority: mid to senior

Type of position: Hybrid Porto


The amazing you, will have:


  • Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related field;
  • Expertise on end-to-end Data Pipeline Development and ETL processes;
  • Proficiency in programming languages such as Python, Java, or Scala;
  • Strong knowledge of SQL and NoSQL databases;
  • Experience with Big Data technologies such as Databricks, Hadoop, Apache Spark, Kafka;
  • Good Knowledge with cloud (AWS, Azure or GCP);
  • Fluency in English is mandatory.
  • Availability for a hybrid regime at Porto or Lisbon (Portugal);


Who are we?


Founded in 2008 and based in Lisbon, KCS IT is a consulting company in the field of Information Technology and Services, focused on creating value for our clients through three main areas: Consulting, Outsourcing, Inovation and Training. Our commitment to talent development is unmistakable in the recent opening of the Porto and Azores hubs, which aims to develop technology for the national and international market. Since 2018 we have been elected one of the 10 major companies in the “Index of Excellence”, an initiative that aims to reward organizations that invest most in the development and satisfaction of their employees.

Title: Data Engineer (Hybrid @Porto)
Description:
We’re looking for the special, unique and amazing YOU!

@ KCS IT, we look for the ones that stands out, for those that always wants to be better and fight for it, and for those who has the same values that we do: dedication, energy, integrity, transparency, flexibility, trust, honesty, hard work, proactivity, team work.

We do not discriminate based on age, ethnicity, sexual orientation, gender, disability or any factor other than merit. All applications with skills for the position are welcome!




We are looking for an Amazing: Data Engineer

Seniority: 6+

Type of position: Hybrid (2x/week at Porto Office)




The amazing you, will have:

Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related field;
6+ years of experience as a Data Engineer;
Expertise on end-to-end Data Pipeline Development, ETL processes and Alteryx;
Knowledge in Data Mesh concepts (Starburst, Trino);
Proficiency in programming languages such as Python, Java, or Scala;
Strong knowledge of SQL and NoSQL databases;
Experience with Big Data technologies such as Databricks, Hadoop, Apache Spark, Kafka;
Availability for a hybrid regime at Porto (Portugal);
Fluency in English is mandatory.




To turn yourself from amazing to unique, you´ll have (plus):

French AND/OR Portuguese fluency.







Why should you become part of our family?

You can develop a career that fits you: your career development is personalized, taking in consideration your needs and goals from a short to long term
Interesting Challenges Ahead: you can work for several clients from different sectors of activity
Free training programs: Our training and certification programs in languages, tech, behavior and business will help you to reach your full potential faster
International projects in Benelux: you can gain international experience in Benelux and balance a new way of living with work
Type of projects (depending on the project you might find one of this types of projects):
In hybrid Systems: Is important to balance work with socialization, that´s why a hybrid system works for us and for you
Full Remote projects: If you want to work while you enjoy the comfort of your home
Full Onsite projects: if you prefere the company of your colleagues!
Take care of your well-being: Enjoy our free nutrition, psicologist, general medicine appointments and our yoga and personal training days… all remote!

Founded in 2008 and based in Lisbon, KCS IT is a consulting company in the field of Information Technology and Services, focused on creating value for our clients through three main areas: Consulting, Outsourcing, Inovation and Training. Our commitment to talent development is unmistakable in the recent opening of the Porto and Azores hubs, which aims to develop technology for the national and international market. Since 2018 we have been elected one of the 10 major companies in the “Index of Excellence”, an initiative that aims to reward organizations that invest most in the development and satisfaction of their employees.

Title: Developer & Data Process Engineer (Entry-level)
Description:
Voxelmaps is seeking to hire a hybrid Developer & Data Process Engineer to support both our Research & Development and data processing operations teams. This is a full-time, permanent role with an immediate start date.

This position blends full stack application development with data pipeline and cloud infrastructure work, focusing on building scalable web platforms while supporting the processing, transformation, and validation of large datasets generated from mapping systems.

You must live in PORTO, PORTUGAL or be willing to relocate, as this is an office-based role.

What You’ll Do


Design, develop, and maintain modern .NET-based web applications and APIs
Build and support data processing pipelines for large-scale mapping datasets
Work with cloud infrastructure (AWS) to support application and data workflows
Develop and maintain frontend components using modern JavaScript frameworks
Execute, monitor, and troubleshoot data processing workflows
Write and maintain automation scripts (Bash/Python)
Manage and deploy services using containerized environments
Collaborate with cross-functional teams to translate business requirements into technical solutions
Debug, test, and optimize both application code and data pipelines
Ensure system performance, reliability, and scalability



What We Expect


Strong problem-solving skills and attention to detail
Ability to work both independently and collaboratively
Ownership mindset with consistent delivery of results
Ability to manage a mix of development, infrastructure, and data tasks
Strong communication skills and ability to follow structured workflows



Required Experience

> Application Development:


Strong experience with C# and .NET / .NET Core / ASP.NET Core
Experience building REST APIs and backend systems
Frontend development experience with JavaScript / TypeScript and React
Solid knowledge of HTML5, CSS3, and responsive design
Strong SQL experience (SQL Server, MySQL, or PostgreSQL)



> Systems, Cloud & Data:


Strong experience with Linux (Ubuntu 22.04 / 24.04)
Experience working with AWS, specifically:
EC2 (compute instances)
S3 (storage and data handling)
Experience using GitLab for version control and collaboration
Strong experience writing Bash scripts for automation
Experience using SSH for remote system access and management
Experience working with Docker (containers, images, logs, volumes)
Ability to troubleshoot data pipelines and system-level issues


Nice to Have


Experience with Keycloak (identity and access management)
Familiarity with server monitoring and observability tools
Experience with Ansible or infrastructure automation tools
Experience with Python 3 (data processing, scripting, or automation)
Experience with CI/CD pipelines
Familiarity with microservices or distributed systems
Exposure to data orchestration tools (e.g., Airflow, Prefect, Dagster)
Experience with Redis, caching systems, or message brokers



Preferred Background


3+ years of experience in software engineering, full stack development, or data engineering
Experience delivering production-grade applications or data pipelines
Experience working with large datasets or cloud-based systems



Compensation


€35,000 gross annually



Job Details


Job Type: Full Time
Location: Porto, Portugal
Work Model: On-site (office environment required)
Benefits: as required by law



Recruitment Process

Application → Screening Interviews → Technical Evaluation → Final Interview → Decision → Hire → Probation Period Evaluation

DO NOT CONTACT THE HIRING MANAGER DIRECTLY. YOU MUST FOLLOW THE APPLICATION PROCESS.

About us:

Voxelmaps Inc. was originally a spin-off from Navmii, one of the leading navigation and mapping companies in the world. Voxelmap’s mission is to build a true 4D volumetric model of the planet, combining visual, spatial and temporal data to create the most detailed map of the world. It does this using a unique patent-pending technology using MRVOGs (Multi-Resolution, Voxel Occupancy Grids).

The company is headquartered in Austin, Texas, USA and works with some of the world’s largest companies across North America and Europe. Further information: https://www.voxelmaps.com

EEO Statement: Voxelmaps is an equal opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment. Supplier shall not require pregnancy or medical tests, except where required by applicable laws or regulations or prudent for workplace safety, and shall not improperly discriminate based on test results.

Title: Data Engineer
Description:
We’re Hiring | Data Engineer (Python + GCP + French B2) | Porto or Lisbon




We are looking for a Data Engineer with strong Python development skills and hands-on experience with Google Cloud Platform (GCP) to join an international and data-driven environment.




What you’ll do:




Design, develop, and maintain scalable ETL/ELT data pipelines
Build and optimize data platforms using GCP services such as BigQuery, Dataflow, Dataproc, Pub/Sub, and Cloud Storage
Develop robust Python solutions for automation, orchestration, and data quality checks
Support testing activities including UAT and QA validations
Collaborate with Data Engineers, Analysts, Data Scientists, and business stakeholders
Ensure data reliability, governance, security, and monitoring best practices
Contribute to technical documentation, code reviews, and Agile ceremonies




What we’re looking for:




3+ years of experience in Data Engineering
Strong Python and SQL skills
Hands-on experience with GCP and modern data architectures
Experience with Airflow / Cloud Composer and CI/CD pipelines
Knowledge of data modeling, ETL/ELT concepts, and data warehouses/lakes
Familiarity with testing practices and data validation processes
French level B2 or higher (mandatory)
Fluent English and strong communication skills




Nice to have:




• Experience with Spark / Databricks

• Knowledge of Control-M or other orchestration tools

• Experience with streaming technologies such as Kafka or Pub/Sub

• BI tools like Looker, Tableau, or Power BI

• GCP certifications




Location: Porto or Lisbon (Hybrid)




By applying, you accept our GDPR policies. Your personal data in your CV and documents will be used solely for processing your application at SYONE. SYONE, S.A. (NIPC 504729624) is the data controller, located at Rua Alfredo da Silva, 8-A, Edifício Stern, Piso 3D, 2610-016 Amadora. We will use your data to tailor your application to relevant vacancies and for potential employment contracts. If selected, your data will be kept during your employment and for at least two years after. If not selected, your data will be kept for two years for future vacancies and then deleted, except for your contact details. You can exercise your rights (access, rectification, erasure, etc.) by emailing data.privacy@syone.com. Your data may be shared with our HR service providers and will be stored securely. You can withdraw your consent at any time. We will not use your data for other purposes without your express consent. For more information, email data.privacy@syone.com.

Title: Data Engineer
Description:
We are looking for a Data Engineer to join a hybrid project in Porto who's eager to embark on an exciting new opportunity! Apply here




About KWAN

We connect IT professionals with projects that match their skills, professional experience, and goals, then we offer a career progression program, delivered by in-house specialists - our People Experience Partners - to guide them through our journey with us.




What we are looking for

Strong experience in Data Engineering and modern Cloud Data Platforms
Experience with Databricks, Azure Synapse, Data Lake and/or Microsoft Purview
Solid knowledge of data modeling concepts (Data Vault, Dimensional Models, Canonical Models)
Hands-on experience building and optimizing data pipelines
Experience with PySpark, ADF, Synapse Pipelines or similar integration/orchestration tools
Understanding of Data Governance, Lineage and Metadata Management principles
Familiarity with DevOps, CI/CD and Infrastructure-as-Code practices
Ability to contribute to scalable and business-oriented data architecture decisions
Experience collaborating with multiple teams and stakeholders in complex environments
Fluent English communication skills




What is this challenge about

Support the evolution of a modern enterprise data platform
Collaborate with multiple data teams to ensure architectural consistency and scalability
Design and optimize data pipelines and integration processes
Contribute to data modeling and data architecture best practices
Work closely with Business Analysts, Data Teams and IT stakeholders
Support governance, data quality and metadata management initiatives
Help define standards and improve data efficiency across the platform
Contribute to scalable, cost-efficient and cloud-oriented solutions




Do you meet most of the position requirements? Then grab this opportunity and apply now!




What we offer

A project that matches your skills and ambitions, as well as your preferences for working policies and culture;
A competitive salary with awesome benefits and opportunities to leverage your knowledge and network to earn additional income;
An empowering and respectful work culture enriched with social and learning events;
A People Experience Partner specially assigned to you - your go-to career guide, responsible for supporting your growth, facilitating training, and ensuring your work-life balance at KWAN.







Some Words From Our Colleagues

“At KWAN, they make sure that I feel comfortable with the client I’m working for and that what I’m doing aligns with my career aspirations.” - Luis Caldeira, DevOps @ KWAN




Does it sound exciting? Apply now!

Description:
Enviar-me por email Guardar

A Integer Consulting é uma empresa portuguesa de consultoria em tecnologias de informação. Somos especialistas em serviços de IT outsourcing, software, projetos de nearshore e desenvolvimento à medida. Somos parceiros dos principais players tecnológicos a nível mundial e trabalhamos com empresas nacionais e multinacionais de diversos setores de atividade. A maioria dos projetos em que participamos são em Portugal, no Brasil e um pouco por toda a Europa. O que nos diferencia é o talento tecnológico e a experiência das pessoas que fazem parte da equipa e que integram os nossos projetos.

Procuramos Data Engineers para atuar em projetos de dados com foco na stack Microsoft on-premise, garantindo a construção, manutenção e evolução de pipelines de dados, modelos analíticos e soluções de reporting. A função envolve trabalhar com tecnologias como Microsoft SQL Server, SQL Server Integration Services, SQL Server Analysis Services, SQL Server Reporting Services e Microsoft Power BI.

Este Pode Ser o Desafio Perfeito, Se Tiveres


Licenciatura em Engenharia Informática ou similar (obrigatório).
Familiaridade com pelo menos uma ferramenta da Stack Microsoft (SSIS, SSRS ou Power BI);
Conhecimentos básicos de SQL (queries, joins, agregações);
Noções de ETL e integração de dados;
Conhecimento básico de modelação de dados.

Title: Data Engineer
Description:
A Job? Or a Lifetime Experience? Start Yours Here!




A nossa missão é ser uma parte significativa da carreira das nossas pessoas. À medida que crescemos, cresce também a determinação em oferecer a melhor experiência aos nossos colaboradores e clientes e é exatamente isso que nos move. Somos uma empresa portuguesa de consultoria tecnológica com escritórios em Lisboa, Porto e Óbidos e representações no Brasil e Tunísia. Contamos com mais de 13 anos de expertise no mercado, e hoje somos um universo de cerca de 400 pessoas a trabalhar em contexto presencial, remoto ou híbrido em projetos em mais de 20 países.




Acreditamos que grandes pessoas fazem empresas de sucesso e por isso mesmo defendemos a valorização, reconhecimento e crescimento dos nossos profissionais.




Não queremos ser mais uma linha do teu CV, queremos que connosco vivas uma Lifetime Experience. Apostamos em formações e certificações que confirmam a tua real progressão, na promoção de um saudável work-life balance e na oferta de benefícios com impacto na tua vida pessoal e carreira.




O que procuramos:

Experiência de trabalho com pelo menos uma plataforma de streaming de eventos (Kafka, Pulsar, Amazon Kinesis Data Streams)
3 ou mais anos de experiência como Data Engineer
Fluência na língua inglesa (mínimo B2)




Ser Affinity

#Affinidade – Criares relações de proximidade e empatia com colegas, clientes e candidatos (e não apenas com tecnologias, linguagens e plataformas). Espírito de equipa e boa disposição;
#Ambição – Quereres fazer mais e melhor. Vontade de exceder expectativas e evoluir pessoal e profissionalmente;
#Ação – Energia para fazer acontecer. Mostrares proatividade e capacidade de iniciativa;
#Aprendizagem – Vontade de evoluir individual e coletivamente e tornares-te um expert no mercado tecnológico.




A tua #LifetimeExperience

Participar em projetos nacionais e internacionais numa empresa baseada em relacionamentos pessoais, na simplicidade e na eficiência, com uma ação disruptiva no mercado tecnológico;
Aceder a um plano de carreira e formação personalizado e diretamente proporcional ao teu desempenho e interesse;
Fazer parte de um ambiente acolhedor, de confiança, respeito e informalidade;
Integrar as nossas Affinity Communities (de desporto, tecnologia, hobbies, etc.) e participar ativamente em projetos de responsabilidade social e ambiental;
Tirar partido de um conjunto de benefícios, parcerias, descontos eventos e dinâmicas internas.




Para além da tua satisfação profissional queremos proporcionar-te oportunidades de lazer e convívio memoráveis e dignos de uma experiência Affinity.




Join the Experience!




Envia-nos a tua candidatura e aproveita para nos conhecer e ir acompanhando em:




https://www.instagram.com/affinityportugal/

https://www.linkedin.com/company/2701281/admin/

https://twitter.com/WithAffinity

A tua #LifetimeExperience

  • Aceder a um plano de carreira e formação personalizado e diretamente proporcional ao teu desempenho e interesse;

Title: Data Analyst
Description:
Make an impact by working for sectors where technology is the enabler, everything is ground-breaking and there’s a constant need to be innovative.

Be part of the team that combines business knowledge, technological edge and a design experience. Our different backgrounds and know-how are key in developing solutions and experiences for digital clients.

Face challenges and learn other ways of thinking and seeing the world - there’s always room for your energy and creativity.

About The Role

A Data Analyst is responsible for examining and interpreting complex data sets to derive meaningful insights and support business decision-making. Focused on descriptive and diagnostic analytics to answer questions of where your company has been, where it is now, why things are the way they are now, and support the decision about what the next steps are.

Their mission involves organizing data, conducting statistical analysis, creating data models, and collecting data requirements from Businesses.

Data analysts collaborate with different teams to understand their analytical requirements, identify key metrics, and communicate data-driven findings to stakeholders effectively.

As a part of your job, you will:


Gathering and analyzing business requirements to determine the best solution for data reporting and analysis;
Designing data solutions such as data warehousing, data marts, dashboards, and reporting systems;
Developing and maintaining data models, reports, and visualizations;
Collaborating with IT teams to ensure proper data integration and management;
Assisting stakeholders in interpreting data insights and making informed business decisions.



What are we looking for?


Proficiency in SQL for data querying and analysis.
Experience with data visualization tools (e.g., Tableau, Power BI, or matplotlib).
Knowledge of statistical analysis techniques and tools (e.g., R, Python libraries like pandas).
Ability to interpret and analyze complex data sets.
Familiarity with data cleansing and preparation techniques.



Personal traits


Ability to adapt to different contexts, teams, and Clients;
Teamwork skills but also a sense of autonomy;
Motivation for international projects and ok if travel is included;
Willingness to collaborate with other players;
Strong communication skills.



At Celfocus, we are committed to cultivating a diverse and inclusive workplace. As an equal-opportunity employer, we welcome applicants of all backgrounds, gender identities, and abilities. We are dedicated to providing reasonable accommodations for candidates with specific needs. If you require any adjustments during the selection process, please inform our Talent Acquisition Team.

Come join the Team!

Celfocus is pioneering the future of business through Next-Gen Intelligence - the convergence of data, AI, and human creativity to build more autonomous and adaptive organisations.

Guided by our core belief - Making Data Actionable - we partner with leading companies to co-create intelligent solutions that turn data into insight, agility, and business value.

Operating in over 25 countries, we bring together business experts, data scientists, and AI engineers to turn complexity into clarity and vision into measurable impact.

Founded in 2000, Celfocus is part of Novabase, listed on Euronext Lisbon.

To know more, visit www.celfocus.com

Title: Porto Cabin Crew Opportunities (Dubai Based, Relocation Provided)
Description:
Job Purpose

A personality that shines, the ability to adapt to any situation and make people feel at ease. These are a few of the qualities we’re looking for in our cabin crew.

As the face of Emirates, you’ll be the person customers turn to for help and direction when they fly with us, so you need to be friendly, observant and able to provide the right support.

Being a member of the cabin crew is so much more than a service role - safety is our highest priority. You’ll need to lead confidently and take control when it comes to managing aircraft services, security, and safety procedures. This comes from the world-class learning experience our crew receive at our state-of-the-art facility in Dubai.




Qualifications & Experience




Here are some other things we look for in our cabin crew:

You’ve had more than a year’s experience in hospitality/customer service
You have a positive attitude and the natural ability to provide excellent service in a team environment, dealing with people from many cultures
Your minimum qualification is high school graduate (Grade 12)
You need to be fluent in written and spoken English
You’re at least 160cm tall and can reach 212 cm while standing on tiptoes, to enable you to reach emergency equipment on all aircraft types
No visible tattoos while you’re in Emirates cabin crew uniform (without covering them with bandages or cosmetics)
As Emirates cabin crew, you’ll be based in Dubai and will need to meet the UAE's employment visa requirements




Aside from the requirements of the role, you should be determined to always perform to the highest standards, focus on being solution oriented, and be able to manage a demanding work schedule. You should have the ability to deliver an authentic experience to our customers. You’ll be culturally aware and reflect the Emirates personality - professional, empathetic, progressive, visionary and cosmopolitan.




Before clicking the Apply button, please keep the following documents ready to submit with your application:

Recent CV in English
Recent photo




Salary & Benefits




Your pay is made up of three components:

a fixed basic salary,
an hourly pay for operated flights and
an overseas meal allowance.




Basic salary = AED 4,980 / month,

Flying Pay = AED 69.60 / hour based on avg. 80-100 hours / month,

Average Total Pay = AED 11,244 / month (~USD 3,100, EUR 2,600 or GBP 2,280)

* These are approximate numbers for Grade II (Economy Class).




Meal allowances for night stops are credited to the salary in arrears the following month.

Hotel accommodation as well as transport to and from the airport is provided by the company.

Title: Colaborador de Relação com Clientes - Balcão de Apoio ao Cliente - 20h Fim-de-Semana (Disponibilidade Total: Sexta, Sábado e Domingo) - Temporário
HTML:
QUEM ÉS TU
Ao visitares uma loja IKEA, é muito provável que te cruzes com colaboradores da área de relação com o cliente. Estes colegas são responsáveis por apoiar a experiência dos nossos clientes no início e no final do percurso na nossa loja. Isto significa que têm um papel muito importante para criar uma sensação positiva a quem nos visita.
Despertámos a tua curiosidade? Boa! Vamos continuar.

Na IKEA acreditamos que todas as pessoas têm talento. Por isso, esperamos que os nossos candidatos tenham:
• Capacidade de organização e de gestão de stresse;
• Sentido de responsabilidade, autonomia e proatividade;
• Confiança na forma como comunicam, gosto por trabalhar em equipa e tomar decisões;
• Uma abordagem flexível e recetiva à mudança, com capacidade para estabelecer prioridades, utilizando o tempo de forma eficiente e produtiva;
• Bons conhecimentos informáticos na ótica do utilizador;
• E conhecimentos de inglês, falado e escrito também poderão ser valorizados.

UM DIA DA TUA VIDA NA IKEA
O nosso departamento de Relação com Clientes divide-se em quatro áreas:
• Småland é o espaço infantil onde os nossos clientes podem deixar as suas crianças, enquanto fazem compras na IKEA. Por isso, é fundamental o sentido de responsabilidade e a boa disposição;
• Caixas, onde apoiamos os nossos clientes no processo de pagamento. Aqui esperamos que os nossos colaboradores sejam prestáveis e empáticos, capazes de gerir frustrações e expectativas dos clientes;
• Apoio ao Cliente com questões que possam ter no momento após a sua compra. Aqui, é especialmente importante apresentar aos nossos clientes soluções rápidas, simples que sejam boas para o cliente e para a IKEA, transformando uma dificuldade numa oportunidade;
• Serviços são uma solução muito relevante para tornar a IKEA mais conveniente para a maioria das pessoas. Nesta área, garantimos a satisfação e otimização da experiência dos clientes, com conhecimento da nossa gama de produtos e serviços.

JUNTOS COMO UMA EQUIPA
Inspirados nas nossas raízes suecas e visão humanista, na IKEA temos uma cultura única. Acreditamos que todas as pessoas têm valor, independentemente de qualquer dimensão da sua identidade - a diversidade é uma mais valia para o nosso negócio.
Valorizamos o espírito de união e a informalidade. Por isso, é muito provável que aqui te vás sentir em casa!

Queremos mesmo criar um melhor dia a dia para os nossos clientes. E para os nossos colaboradores.
Assim, estes são alguns dos benefícios que oferecemos:
• Restaurante de Colaboradores: espaço dedicado a colaboradores, com opções diversas e saudáveis, para uma refeição completa a um valor acessível (de fazer crescer água na boca!)
• Horários comunicados com antecedência para que seja mais simples conciliar o trabalho com a tua vida pessoal (estudos, hobbies, trabalhos, ou mesmo para não fazer nada...)
• Apoio social e psicológico através do programa CÖNTIGO;
• Bónus anual para celebrar o esforço conjunto para fazermos crescer o negócio;
• Descontos e benefícios em parcerias: ginásios, tecnologia, cosmética, hotéis, viagens, etc.;
• Oportunidades de formação contínua online, em sala e on job para explorares o teu potencial.

Trabalhar na IKEA é muito mais do que ter um trabalho.







A DAY IN YOUR LIFE WITH US

O nosso departamento de Relação com Clientes divide-se em quatro áreas:
• Småland é o espaço infantil onde os nossos clientes podem deixar as suas crianças, enquanto fazem compras na IKEA. Por isso, é fundamental o sentido de responsabilidade e a boa disposição;
• Caixas, onde apoiamos os nossos clientes no processo de pagamento. Aqui esperamos que os nossos colaboradores sejam prestáveis e empáticos, capazes de gerir frustrações e expectativas dos clientes;
• Apoio ao Cliente com questões que possam ter no momento após a sua compra. Aqui, é especialmente importante apresentar aos nossos clientes soluções rápidas, simples que sejam boas para o cliente e para a IKEA, transformando uma dificuldade numa oportunidade;
• Serviços são uma solução muito relevante para tornar a IKEA mais conveniente para a maioria das pessoas. Nesta área, garantimos a satisfação e otimização da experiência dos clientes, com conhecimento da nossa gama de produtos e serviços.

HTML:

  • Strategy (Outsourcing, Team as a Service, Tech Academies);
  • R&D (Estágios, POC, Laboratório Tecnológico);

Na ADENTIS centramo-nos nas PESSOAS e é este o nosso salário emocional:

  • Equilíbrio entre a vida profissional e pessoal;
  • Flexibilidade na rotina organizacional;
  • Benefícios de saúde para colaboradores e familiares;
  • Eventos Team Building;
  • Protocolo com mais de 600 parceiros;

Title: Data Analyst (HYBRID @Porto)
Description:
We’re looking for the special, unique and amazing YOU!

@ KCS IT, we look for the ones that stands out, for those that always wants to be better and fight for it, and for those who has the same values that we do: dedication, energy, integrity, transparency, flexibility, trust, honesty, hard work, proactivity, team work.

At KCS we stand for equality and value diversity. We create a safe, diverse environment where opportunities are equal for everyone! We do not discriminate based on age, ethnicity, sexual orientation, gender, disability or any factor other than merit. All applications with skills for the position are welcome!

Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, Statistics or Mathematics;
3+ years of experience as Data Analyst;
Proficiency with ETL, SQL, PowerBI and Alteryx;
Experience with Jaspersoft, VBA, API, Python and Tibco Spotfire are nice to have;

Comfort speaking French.

Who are we?

Title: Técnico de Control de Gestión (ES)
HTML:
Como miembro del equipo de Control de Gestión de Mota-Engil África, sus principales responsabilidades serán: participar en el proceso de cierre mensual, consolidación y presentación de informes financieros, garantizando la fiabilidad, la coherencia y la armonización de la información procedente de los diferentes mercados y zonas geográficas; Trabajar en estrecha colaboración con los equipos locales, promoviendo la armonización de los procesos, los criterios de presentación de informes y las buenas prácticas de control de gestión; Preparar periódicamente informes y presentaciones de gestión que sirvan de apoyo a la toma de decisiones; Realizar un seguimiento de los indicadores de rendimiento operativo y financiero en los diferentes mercados, identificando desviaciones y proponiendo medidas correctivas; Apoyar los procesos de auditoría externa y garantizar la coordinación continua entre los auditores, los equipos locales y la estructura corporativa; Colaborar en la elaboración del presupuesto anual y las previsiones, garantizando la interacción y la coordinación con las diferentes operaciones; Apoyar iniciativas de mejora continua de los procesos de control, presentación de informes y análisis financiero, promoviendo una mayor eficiencia y estandarización entre las distintas zonas geográficas.

Requisitos de la función y perfil de competencias

  • Licenciatura o máster en Economía, Gestión, Finanzas o un área similar;
  • Experiencia profesional mínima de 2 años en el ámbito financiero;
  • Conocimientos de la normativa contable internacional y nacional;
  • Dominio de las herramientas de MS Office y conocimientos de SAP;
  • Fluidez en inglés (imprescindible);
  • Gran capacidad de relación interpersonal y de trabajo en equipo con equipos multiculturales y multidisciplinares;
  • Capacidad analítica y orientación a la resolución de problemas;
  • Capacidad de organización, planificación y gestión de prioridades;
  • Rigor, sentido de la responsabilidad y atención al detalle;
  • Espíritu de equipo, proactividad y capacidad de adaptación a entornos dinámicos e internacionales;
  • Disponibilidad para viajes internacionales ocasionales.

Title: Assistente de Atendimento a Clientes
HTML:
A Synchro, Outsourcing by Egor, está a recrutar Assistente de Atendimento a Cliente para colaborar com Organização Desportiva em Matosinhos.

FUNÇÃO

  • Atendimento a clientes em loja presencial;
  • Auxiliar na organização e reposição de produtos na loja;
  • Prestação de esclarecimentos, divulgação e comercialização de produtos e serviços.

LOCAL E HORÁRIO

  • Horário rotativo em Full-time (entre as 09h00 e as 00h00);
  • Matosinhos.

REQUISITOS

  • 12.º ano de escolaridade;
  • Gosto pelo atendimento ao cliente;
  • Gosto por desporto;
  • Conhecimentos de inglês;
  • Conhecimentos de Informática na ótica do utilizador.

CONDIÇÕES

  • Contrato de trabalho (previsão até 31/08);
  • Vencimento Base 920€ + Subsídio de turno 184€ + Subsídio de Alimentação 10,46€/dia (cartão);
  • Abono de caixa 26,42€.

Os candidatos interessados devem submeter o CV atualizado.
